Tests the behavior of the Math.round function with negative infinity.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test assertion that checks the behavior of the `Math.round` function when applied to negative infinity. The assertion verifies that `Math.round(-Infinity)` returns `-Infinity`, which is the expected behavior according to the ECMAScript specification. This code provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific edge case for the `Math.round` method. It is likely part of a larger test suite intended to ensure the correct implementation of mathematical functions in a JavaScript environment.
